## Language Checklist

- [ ] Uses "simulated virtual card" for the MVP card output.
- [ ] Uses "Casper mainnet CSPR" for native payments.
- [ ] Uses "mockUSDC CEP-18" only for the mock/test token rail.
- [ ] Does not claim production Visa issuance, a production card, or real USDC unless that has been implemented and verified.
- [ ] Does not include API keys, private keys, mnemonics, bearer tokens, webhook secrets, wallet files, or `.env` contents.
